guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 80. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_cl: Point to the big CL and say: clclcl. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_cr: Now point to the big CR and say: crcrcr.

parent_story: A clock sat on the table. A crab crawled past.
